body.title: Encode sprint loop as PROC engram in Igor memory
body.result: PROC_CODE_A_TICKET + INTERP_WHY_THE_LOOP seeded. Full sprint loop encoded: read ticket → grep → read files → plan → self_edit → pytest → deposit EPISODIC. Canonical exercise in PROC narrative. Lever 3 of 3 complete.
body.description: PROCEDURAL engram: read ticket, grep codebase for touch point, plan (1 para), self_edit, run pytest, deposit result as EPISODIC. Pattern: PROC_WHAT_TIME but for coding process. First iteration handholded with CC present. Enables Igor to run the loop himself.
